scripts.dev:api: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a; npm --workspace @agentcred/api run dev'
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n api,web,worker -c green,blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web:start" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.dev:stack:build: npm run dev:web:build && npm run dev:stack
scripts.dev:down: pkill -f 'next start -p 3002' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pkill -f '@agentcred/api' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pkill -f '@agentcred/worker' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
